input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.2.5
            TITLE: some critical fastener applications have additional requirements that are provided in the

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.2.5: Some Critical Fastener applications have additional requirements that are provided in the
T.8.2.5 Some Critical Fastener applications have additional requirements that are provided in the 
applicable section.

final_answer: Some Critical Fastener applications have additional requirements that are provided in the applicable section.
